reviews.review_description: Bloody Monks is a wild and thrilling experience that perfectly blends chaotic action with unexpected humor. The game throws you into a world where agile, mysterious monks are on the loose, battling each other in an environment filled with traps, hidden secrets, and frenetic energy. As you navigate the unpredictable landscapes, you'll find yourself dodging sudden attacks, outwitting enemies, and embracing the pure absurdity of it all. The combat is as fluid as it is entertaining, with monks flinging themselves into acrobatic duels that keep you on the edge of your seat. What makes it even more fun is the surprising mix of ridiculousness and intensity—you never know when you’ll be blindsided by a monk swinging in from nowhere or landing a perfectly timed strike. It’s a game that’s all about adrenaline, laughs, and never taking things too seriously, making every match feel fresh and ridiculously fun.
my friend was very laggy and could barely walk and was clipping through the map and the games also just bad
Really fun but a bit laggy
